content:
Hai a disposizione un backup recente? Puoi fornire il maggior numero possibile di queste informazioni:

  1. Versione di Thunderbird
  2. Versione del sistema operativo
  3. Provider delle caselle email (Gmail, Libero, Hotmail, etc.)
  4. Tipologia di account (POP3, IMAP)
  5. Estensioni installate
  6. Messaggi di errore che vengono visualizzati durante l'utilizzo di Thunderbird
  7. Software di sicurezza eventualmente presenti (Antivirus e simili)
  8. Screenshot del problema (se utile a chiarire il contesto)
creator: @next

content: The most usual cause is the phone being configured as a POP mail client and removing the mail from the server when it is downloaded so there is nothing left to share.
creator: MattAuSupport

content: Thanks heaps for answering. Interestingly however, if I search for the mail that is still on my phone in the 'filter messages' field, I can find it. It's just that it doesn't show up in my inbox, even after I found it!

content:
what font is selected for the body text? Is it actually installed in Windows 11?

One of the issues that can arise with moving profile data with copy and paste is you do not get to reset operating system specific settings. It is my preferred method of moving a profile, but it does have some drawbacks. Especially for those that have customized fonts or file locations.
creator: MattAuSupport
